rows.name: Vertical consumption ('worst-case' crowd) - per person
rows.source_description: MDA data widely accepted at VCAT. Standing patrons drinking and talking. Focus of activity on drinking and socialising. Spectrum adopted from SA.

rows.name: Taverns with significant food offerings - per person
rows.source_description: MDA data widely accepted at VCAT. Predominantly seated patrons, drinking, dining and talking. Focus of activity on drinking, whilst dining and socialising. Spectrum adopted from SA.

rows.name: Restaurant dining - per person
rows.source_description: MDA data widely accepted at VCAT. Seated patrons, drinking, dining and talking. Focus of activity on dining and socialising. Spectrum adopted from SA.

rows.name: Small smoking areas (<40 patrons) - per person
rows.source_description: MDA data widely accepted at VCAT. Patron area used for smoking. Focus of activity on smoking rather than socialising, although can include drinking as well. Spectrum adopted from SA.
